locations.name: 拉潘帕省
locations.summary: 拉潘帕省（西班牙語：La Pampa）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷中部，首府為圣罗莎。

locations.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省
locations.summary: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省（西班牙語：Buenos Aires）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，是阿根廷二十四个自治省份（estados autogobernados）之一或者一级司法管辖权（jurisdicciones de primer orde…

relations.subject: Brown-chested martin
relations.evidence: It is found in Panama and throughout South America east of the Andes as far south as La Pampa and Buenos Aires provinces in Argentina. The brown-chested martin inhabits semi-open to open landscapes such as grasslands, cultivated areas, clearings in forest, and human settlements
